name: tt
description: Commands for discovering your unknowns across the map-vs-territory workflow (trq212, 'The map is not the territory'). Named by phase: /before-blindspot, /before-brainstorm, /before-interview, /before-references, /before-plan (which also keeps implementation notes while building); /after-pitch, /after-comprehend. Plus skills towles-tool and parallel-slots.
